/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc  -ggdb -Os -Wall -Wno-unused-parameter -g  -static CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/main.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/screen_tracing.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/test_inject.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/test_live.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/tr_dump.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/tr_dump_ioctl.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/tr_meta.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/tracer/tr_render.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/common/task_dump.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/common/term.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/common/tui_input.c.o CMakeFiles/tracer.dir/common/tui_layout.c.o -o tracer
